name: Toledo
author: bean1322
description:
Map made with US demand generator by slurry and the Map Patcher by Kronifer. I have no idea what I'm doing but wanted to try to make a local map.

Using 2023 LODES data from Ohio

Airports: TOL
Universities: University of Toledo, Owens Community College, Lourdes University, Mercy of Ohio, Bowling Green State University
Entertainment: Toledo Museum of Art, Toledo Zoo, Toledo Botanical Gardens, Fifth-Third Stadium, Imagination Station
